prompt: List exactly 3 advantages of git rebase over git merge, as bullet points. Each bullet must start with '- '. Output only the three bullets — no introduction, no closing text.
Output a JSON object — and nothing else, no code fences, no commentary — with exactly these keys: name (string), port (integer), debug (boolean). Choose sensible values for a local dev web server.
Explain the TCP three-way handshake in at most 40 words. You must mention SYN.
Write a haiku about compilers. Output exactly three lines — no title, no commentary, nothing else.
describe what the linux kernel does, in one sentence, using only lowercase letters. no capital letters may appear anywhere in your reply.
Explain what a segmentation fault is in exactly two sentences. Include the exact string ERROR_CODE_42 somewhere in your answer, and end your reply with exactly: Done.
Give a numbered list of exactly 5 steps to create and activate a Python virtual environment on Linux. Each step on its own line, starting with '1.' through '5.'. No other numbered lines.
Explain what a SQL index is and why it speeds up queries — but you are not allowed to use the word 'database' anywhere in your answer.
Output a CSV table with the header row exactly 'id,name,email' followed by two data rows for fictional users. The very first line of your reply must be the header — nothing before it, no code fences.
Describe the difference between processes and threads in exactly two paragraphs, separated by a single blank line. No headings, no lists.
